power-attack.name: Power Attack
power-attack.description: Trade attack bonus for extra damage
power-attack.notes: Take -{value} to melee attack rolls, gain +{value} to melee damage

defensive-fighting.name: Defensive Fighting
defensive-fighting.description: Gain +2 to Reflex Defense, take -2 to attacks
defensive-fighting.notes: Swift action to toggle on/off. +2 Reflex Defense, -2 to attack rolls

total-defense.name: Total Defense
total-defense.description: Gain +2 to all defenses, cannot attack
total-defense.notes: Standard action. +2 to all defenses until start of your next turn. Cannot make attacks while active.

rapid-shot.name: Rapid Shot
rapid-shot.description: Make one extra ranged attack at -2 to all attacks
rapid-shot.notes: Full-round action. Make one extra ranged attack. All attacks take -2 penalty.

double-attack.name: Double Attack
double-attack.notes: Full-round action. Make two attacks, each at -5 penalty. Requires BAB +6.

running-attack.name: Running Attack
running-attack.description: Make single attack during move action
running-attack.notes: Make a single melee or ranged attack at any point during a move action.

charging-fire.name: Charging Fire
charging-fire.description: Make ranged attack at end of charge
charging-fire.notes: Make a ranged attack at the end of a charge, taking -2 penalty on the attack roll.

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.description: Make immediate melee attack after dropping enemy
cleave.trigger: You drop an enemy to 0 HP with a melee attack
cleave.notes: When you drop an enemy to 0 HP with a melee attack, you can immediately make one melee attack against another adjacent enemy.

combat-reflexes.name: Combat Reflexes
combat-reflexes.notes: You can make a number of attacks of opportunity per round equal to your Dexterity modifier (minimum 1).

trigger-work.name: Trigger Work (Rapid Shot)
trigger-work.description: No penalty when using Rapid Shot
trigger-work.notes: Negates the -2 penalty from Rapid Shot feat. Requires Gunslinger talent tree.

controlled-burst.name: Controlled Burst
controlled-burst.notes: Reduce autofire or burst-fire penalty by 2. If braced, no penalty. Requires Weapon Master talent tree.

multiattack-proficiency-rifles.name: Multiattack Proficiency (Rifles)
multiattack-proficiency-rifles.description: Reduce multiattack penalty by 2 for rifles
multiattack-proficiency-rifles.notes: Reduce multiattack penalty by 2 when using rifles. Requires Weapon Master talent tree.

multiattack-proficiency-pistols.name: Multiattack Proficiency (Pistols)
multiattack-proficiency-pistols.description: Reduce multiattack penalty by 2 for pistols
multiattack-proficiency-pistols.notes: Reduce multiattack penalty by 2 when using pistols. Requires Gunslinger talent tree.

multiattack-proficiency-heavy.name: Multiattack Proficiency (Heavy)
multiattack-proficiency-heavy.description: Reduce multiattack penalty by 2 for heavy weapons
multiattack-proficiency-heavy.notes: Reduce multiattack penalty by 2 when using heavy weapons. Requires Weapon Master talent tree.

dash-and-blast.name: Dash and Blast
dash-and-blast.description: Move twice your speed and attack with each pistol
dash-and-blast.notes: Once per encounter. Move twice your speed and make attacks with each pistol. Requires Pistoleer talent tree.

hailfire.name: Hailfire
hailfire.description: Attack as if autofire with two pistols
hailfire.notes: With two pistols, attack as if using autofire even without autofire, applying autofire penalties. Requires Pistoleer talent tree.

improved-suppression-fire.name: Improved Suppression Fire
improved-suppression-fire.notes: When you suppress an enemy, that enemy takes -5 attack. If targeting with autofire, each enemy in the area takes -2 attack. Requires Weapon Specialist talent tree.

draw-fire.name: Draw Fire
draw-fire.notes: Make Persuasion vs Will. Target cannot attack anyone within 6 squares if you do not have cover. Requires Commando talent tree.

cover-fire.name: Cover Fire
cover-fire.description: Grant allies +1 Defense when you attack
cover-fire.notes: When you make a ranged attack, allies within 6 squares gain +1 Defense until your next turn. Requires Commando talent tree.

melee-defense.name: Melee Defense
melee-defense.description: Trade attack for defense against melee
melee-defense.notes: Swift action. Take -5 to melee attacks, gain +5 to Reflex Defense vs melee until your next turn.

acrobatic-strike.name: Acrobatic Strike
acrobatic-strike.description: Tumble through enemy space for attack bonus
acrobatic-strike.notes: Use Acrobatics to tumble through enemy space. Gain +2 on your next melee attack against that enemy.

whirlwind-attack.name: Whirlwind Attack
whirlwind-attack.notes: Full-round action. Make one melee attack against each adjacent enemy. Requires BAB +4, Dex 13, Dodge, Mobility.

block-feat.name: Block
block-feat.description: Negate a melee attack with a Use the Force check against the attack roll; cumulative Block/Deflect penalty applies.
block-feat.trigger: You are targeted by a melee attack
block-feat.notes: Requires active lightsaber, awareness, and not being Flat-Footed. Can spend a Force Point to protect an adjacent character.

deflect-feat.name: Deflect
deflect-feat.description: Negate a ranged attack with a Use the Force check against the attack roll; cumulative Block/Deflect penalty applies.
deflect-feat.trigger: You are targeted by a ranged attack
deflect-feat.notes: Requires active lightsaber, awareness, and not being Flat-Footed. Can spend a Force Point to protect an adjacent character.

redirect-shot-feat.name: Redirect Shot
redirect-shot-feat.description: Once per round after successfully Deflecting a single blaster bolt, redirect it as an immediate ranged attack.
redirect-shot-feat.trigger: You successfully Deflect a single blaster bolt
redirect-shot-feat.notes: Autofire barrages and non-blaster projectiles cannot be redirected.

bantha-rush.name: Bantha Rush
bantha-rush.trigger: You hit with a melee attack
bantha-rush.notes: Swift action after melee hit. Make a free bull rush attempt against the target.

mighty-swing.name: Mighty Swing
mighty-swing.description: Reroll melee attack once per encounter
mighty-swing.notes: Once per encounter. Reroll a melee attack roll and take the better result.

pin.name: Pin
pin.notes: Standard action. Make grapple check. If successful, target is immobilized until they escape.

trip.name: Trip
trip.notes: Standard action. Make attack roll vs Reflex Defense. If successful, target is knocked prone.

shake-it-off.name: Shake It Off
shake-it-off.notes: Swift action. Move +1 step on condition track. Once per encounter.

sniper-shot.name: Sniper Shot
sniper-shot.description: Aim and fire with bonus damage
sniper-shot.notes: After using Aim action, add +5 damage to next ranged attack. Stacks with Aim bonus.

improved-disarm.name: Improved Disarm
improved-disarm.notes: +5 to disarm attempts. No attack of opportunity provoked.

improved-grapple.name: Improved Grapple
improved-grapple.notes: +5 to grapple checks. No attack of opportunity provoked.

elusive-target-feat.name: Elusive Target
elusive-target-feat.description: Redirect missed attacks when fighting defensively
elusive-target-feat.condition: When fighting defensively or using total defense
elusive-target-feat.notes: When fighting defensively, missed melee attacks against you may be redirected to another adjacent target.

burst-of-speed.name: Burst of Speed
burst-of-speed.notes: Swift action. Increase your speed by 2 squares until end of your turn.

strong-in-the-force.name: Strong in the Force
strong-in-the-force.notes: Passive +1 bonus to Use the Force checks.

force-sensitivity.name: Force Sensitivity
force-sensitivity.notes: You can use the Force. This feat is a prerequisite for many Force-related abilities.

skill-focus.name: Skill Focus
skill-focus.notes: Gain +5 competence bonus to one skill. Can be taken multiple times for different skills.

toughness.name: Toughness
toughness.notes: +1 hit point per character level. Can be taken multiple times.

burst-fire.name: Burst Fire
burst-fire.description: Use autofire against single target with +2 dice damage
burst-fire.notes: Full-round action. Make an autofire attack against a single target instead of an area. Takes -5 penalty on attack roll. Adds 2 extra dice of the weapon's damage type (e.g., if weapon is 3d10, damage becomes 5d10). Consumes 5 shots instead of 10. This is not considered an area attack, so Evasion talent does not reduce damage.

guardian-spirit-consult.name: Consult Guardian Spirit
guardian-spirit-consult.description: Use Search Your Feelings by consulting your Guardian Spirit; GM reveals immediate consequences and destiny implications.
guardian-spirit-consult.notes: Use the existing Search Your Feelings / Use the Force roll workflow as needed. This talent expands the information received; final details are GM-adjudicated.

guardian-spirit-claim-bonus-fp.name: Claim Guardian Spirit Bonus Force Point
guardian-spirit-claim-bonus-fp.description: After at least 6 hours of rest, claim the daily bonus Force Point granted by Guardian Spirit.
guardian-spirit-claim-bonus-fp.notes: The bonus Force Point can only be used to improve a Force Power or activate a Force Technique or Force Secret and is lost if unused by the next day.

crucial-advice.name: Crucial Advice
crucial-advice.description: Once per encounter after failing a Skill Check, reroll that Skill Check with a +2 circumstance bonus.
crucial-advice.notes: Opens a skill reroll chooser and rolls the failed skill with a +2 circumstance bonus. Once per encounter.

manifest-guardian-spirit.name: Manifest Guardian Spirit
manifest-guardian-spirit.description: Spend a Force Point as a Swift Action to manifest your Guardian Spirit for the encounter.
manifest-guardian-spirit.notes: Marks the Guardian Spirit as manifested. Positioning and morale bonuses are adjudicated by the GM/player.

move-guardian-spirit.name: Move Guardian Spirit
move-guardian-spirit.description: Move your manifested Guardian Spirit up to 6 squares once per turn.
move-guardian-spirit.notes: Only available while the Guardian Spirit is manifested. Move it up to 6 squares; table adjudicates position.

vital-encouragement.name: Vital Encouragement
vital-encouragement.description: Once per encounter, gain Bonus Hit Points equal to 10 + one-half your Heroic Level.
vital-encouragement.notes: Bonus Hit Points from multiple sources do not stack and expire at encounter end.

distracting-apparition.name: Distracting Apparition
distracting-apparition.description: While your Guardian Spirit is manifested, enemies within 3 squares of it take -2 Will Defense and -2 attack rolls against you.
distracting-apparition.notes: Positional aura is GM/player adjudicated from the Guardian Spirit location.

aversion.name: Aversion
aversion.description: Spend a Force Point as a Swift Action to radiate an aura; enemies treat squares within 2 squares of you as difficult terrain until encounter end.
aversion.notes: Mind-Affecting effect. ActiveEffect marks the aura; enemy movement is table-adjudicated.

illusion.name: Illusion
illusion.description: Spend a Force Point and roll Use the Force to create an illusion. The dialog applies the selected size penalty.
illusion.notes: Uses the Illusion UTF dialog with size selection, optional Will Defense, Illusion Bond, and Masquerade toggles.

link.name: Link
link.description: Designate a willing trained Use the Force ally within 12 squares and line of sight; aid each other on UTF checks as a Reaction.
link.notes: Stores linked ally metadata and posts the Link rules to chat.

suppress-force.name: Suppress Force
suppress-force.description: Spend one ready use of Mind Trick as a Reaction and roll Use the Force against the target's UTF result to negate its Force check.
suppress-force.notes: Requires a ready Mind Trick power. Dialog asks for target name/result and rolls UTF.

telepathic-link.name: Telepathic Link
telepathic-link.description: Establish a telepathic link with one willing Force-sensitive ally; once per encounter, share a Force Power with consent.
telepathic-link.notes: Stores one active linked ally and posts the shared-power reminder.

telekinetic-savant.name: Telekinetic Savant
telekinetic-savant.description: Recover one spent [Telekinetic] Force Power without spending a Force Point.
telekinetic-savant.notes: Use the Force Suite recovery controls to choose the spent [Telekinetic] power. Uses remaining are tracked per encounter.

influence-savant.name: Influence Savant
influence-savant.description: Recover one spent [Mind-Affecting] Force Power without spending a Force Point.
influence-savant.notes: Use the Force Suite recovery controls to choose the spent [Mind-Affecting] power. Uses remaining are tracked per encounter.

telekinetic-power.name: Telekinetic Power
telekinetic-power.description: On a natural 20 UTF check to activate a [Telekinetic] Force Power, use that power again immediately as a Free Action.
telekinetic-power.notes: The repeat button appears on the Force Power roll card when the trigger occurs.

disciplined-strike.name: Disciplined Strike
disciplined-strike.description: When using an area Force Power, exclude targets equal to Wisdom modifier, minimum 1.
disciplined-strike.notes: Area Force Power roll cards display the exclusion count when applicable.

move-massive-object.name: Move Massive Object
move-massive-object.description: When activating Move Object on a Large or larger object, spend a Force Point to make an area attack with the object.
move-massive-object.notes: Use the Move Object activation option; area size depends on object size.

adept-negotiator.name: Adept Negotiator
adept-negotiator.description: Make a Persuasion check, or Use the Force with Force Persuasion, against one opponent's Will Defense to move them down the Condition Track.
adept-negotiator.notes: Applies Condition Track movement only. It does not deal HP damage or physical damage and affects the specific character, not a starship.
adept-negotiator.targetHint: Opponent with Intelligence 3+ within 12 squares who can see, hear, and understand you. Higher-level targets add +5 to Will Defense.

force-persuasion.name: Force Persuasion
force-persuasion.description: Use your Use the Force modifier instead of Persuasion and count as trained in Persuasion.
force-persuasion.notes: Adept Negotiator automatically uses Use the Force when this talent is owned. Persuasion training is handled by the derived skill calculator.

master-negotiator.name: Master Negotiator
master-negotiator.description: Successful Adept Negotiator use moves the target an additional -1 step down the Condition Track.
master-negotiator.notes: The Adept Negotiator action applies the extra Condition Track step automatically when this talent is owned. No HP damage is dealt.

skilled-advisor.name: Skilled Advisor
skilled-advisor.description: Advise an ally to grant +5 on their next Skill Check, or +10 if you spend a Force Point.
skilled-advisor.notes: Prompts for an ally, skill, and optional Force Point spend. Bonus Force Points are spent before normal Force Points.

adversary-lore.name: Adversary Lore
adversary-lore.description: Roll Use the Force against a target creature's Will Defense; on success, it takes -2 Reflex Defense against you and allies who can hear and understand you until the end of your next turn.
adversary-lore.notes: Creates a target-scoped reminder effect; does not globally lower Reflex Defense for all attackers.

aggressive-negotiator.name: Aggressive Negotiator
aggressive-negotiator.description: After damaging an opponent with a lightsaber attack, you can Take 10 on Persuasion checks before the end of your next turn.
aggressive-negotiator.notes: Also has a passive hook for attack-resolution events when the system emits them.

cleanse-mind.name: Cleanse Mind
cleanse-mind.description: Remove one ongoing Mind-Affecting effect from one allied target within line of sight.
cleanse-mind.notes: Can remove the special Adept Negotiator condition marker and restore the recorded previous Condition Track step.

collective-visions.name: Collective Visions
collective-visions.description: When you use Farseeing or a prerequisite-linked power/talent, nearby Force-users with Farseeing can Aid Another as a Reaction.
collective-visions.notes: Posts the Aid Another reminder; the Farseeing roll remains the normal roll path.

consulars-vitality.name: Consular's Vitality
consulars-vitality.description: Grant one ally Bonus Hit Points equal to 5 + your Charisma modifier until the beginning of your next turn; you take -5 on UTF checks until then.
consulars-vitality.notes: Bonus Hit Points do not stack; damage comes from Bonus Hit Points first.

consulars-wisdom.name: Consular's Wisdom
consulars-wisdom.description: Once per encounter, one ally adds your Wisdom bonus to Will Defense against Mind-Affecting effects until the end of the encounter.
consulars-wisdom.notes: Creates a conditional reminder effect instead of globally increasing Will Defense.

entreat-aid.name: Entreat Aid
entreat-aid.description: Spend a Force Point to let one adjacent ally use Aid Another as a Reaction to assist your next Skill Check before the end of your turn.
entreat-aid.notes: Tracks the chosen ally for the current turn so the same ally cannot be targeted again since the end of your last turn.

force-of-will.name: Force of Will
force-of-will.description: Spend a Force Point to give allies within 6 squares a +2 insight bonus to Will Defense for the encounter while they remain within 6 squares.
force-of-will.notes: The owner's personal +2 insight Will bonus is passive; this action handles the ally aura and uses the shared Force Point spender.

guiding-strikes.name: Guiding Strikes
guiding-strikes.description: After damaging a target with a lightsaber attack on your turn, adjacent allies gain +2 circumstance bonus to melee attacks against that target until your next turn.
guiding-strikes.notes: Creates a target-scoped reminder effect; adjacency and lightsaber-damage timing remain GM/player adjudicated if the attack hook cannot prove them.

improved-consulars-vitality.name: Improved Consular's Vitality
improved-consulars-vitality.description: After damaging a target with a lightsaber attack, use Consular's Vitality as a Free Action until the start of your next turn.
improved-consulars-vitality.notes: Uses the same Consular's Vitality dialog/effect, but the combat action itself does not consume a Swift Action.

know-weakness.name: Know Weakness
know-weakness.description: Successful Adversary Lore causes the target to take +1d6 damage from successful attacks by you or allies who can hear and understand you until the end of your next turn.
know-weakness.notes: Automatically tags successful Adversary Lore targets with a reminder effect.

recall.name: Recall
recall.description: Whenever you spend a Force Point to return a Force Power to your suite, regain two Force Powers instead of one.
recall.notes: Implemented in Force Suite Force Point recovery: selected spent power plus one additional spent power are recovered when available.

renew-vision.name: Renew Vision
renew-vision.description: Once per encounter, regain all expended uses of the Farseeing Force Power as a Swift Action.
renew-vision.notes: Does not spend a Force Point. Recovers all spent/discarded Farseeing items and tracks once-per-encounter use.

visionary-attack.name: Visionary Attack
visionary-attack.description: After you or an ally within 12 squares misses, expend a ready Farseeing use and roll UTF vs the target's Will Defense; on success the attacker rerolls.
visionary-attack.notes: Consumes one ready Farseeing use and applies the cumulative -5 UTF penalty until the beginning of your next turn.

visionary-defense.name: Visionary Defense
visionary-defense.description: When you or an ally within 12 squares is targeted by an attack, expend a ready Farseeing use and roll UTF vs the attacker's Will; on success grant +5 Reflex against that attack.
visionary-defense.notes: Consumes one ready Farseeing use and applies the cumulative -5 UTF penalty until the beginning of your next turn.

watchcircle-initiate.name: WatchCircle Initiate
watchcircle-initiate.description: Expend a ready Farseeing use and make a DC 15 UTF check; on success lose 1 normal Force Point and grant 1 Force Point to an ally in line of sight.
watchcircle-initiate.notes: The self cost cannot be paid from temporary/bonus Force Points and does not count as spending a Force Point.

acrobatic-recovery.name: Acrobatic Recovery
acrobatic-recovery.description: When an effect would knock you Prone, make a DC 20 Acrobatics check to remain standing.
acrobatic-recovery.notes: Triggered by falling Prone; uses the normal skill roll dialog.

battle-meditation.name: Battle Meditation
battle-meditation.description: Spend a Force Point to give you and allies within 6 squares +1 insight bonus on attack rolls for the encounter.
battle-meditation.notes: Creates range-conditioned reminder effects; allied Gunners are included at Starship Scale.

elusive-target.name: Elusive Target
elusive-target.description: Ranged attacks against you while you are in melee take an additional -5 penalty.
elusive-target.notes: Conditional penalty; not a permanent Reflex Defense increase.

force-intuition.name: Force Intuition
force-intuition.description: Use Use the Force instead of Initiative and count as trained in Initiative; applies to starship Initiative if piloting.
force-intuition.notes: Implemented in the derived skill/initiative calculator; this entry documents the passive behavior.

resilience.name: Resilience
resilience.description: Spend a Full-Round Action to move +2 steps up the Condition Track.
resilience.notes: Uses ConditionEngine to improve the actor condition step by 2.

close-maneuvering.name: Close Maneuvering
close-maneuvering.description: Designate a target; your movement does not provoke AoO from that target if you end adjacent.
close-maneuvering.notes: Stores the designated target for GM/player adjudication.

cover-escape.name: Cover Escape
cover-escape.description: After you spend a Force Point to Block or Deflect an attack against an adjacent ally, that ally may move 2 squares as a Free Action without provoking.
cover-escape.notes: Triggered by successful Block/Deflect; posts a reminder.

defensive-acuity.name: Defensive Acuity
defensive-acuity.description: When you Fight Defensively, lightsaber attacks deal +1 die and Block/Deflect UTF checks gain +2 until the end of your next turn.
defensive-acuity.notes: Conditional Fight Defensively benefit; not a permanent lightsaber damage bonus.

exposing-strike.name: Exposing Strike
exposing-strike.description: After damaging a target with a lightsaber, spend a Force Point to make it Flat-Footed until the end of your next turn.
exposing-strike.notes: The action itself is a triggered rider; Force Point spending happens in the talent action.

forceful-warrior.name: Forceful Warrior
forceful-warrior.description: When you score a critical hit with a lightsaber, gain 1 temporary Force Point until encounter end.
forceful-warrior.notes: The attack hook grants a source-aware bonus Force Point when a lightsaber critical can be detected.

grenade-defense.name: Grenade Defense
grenade-defense.description: When attacked by a grenade, roll Use the Force against the attack roll DC to hurl it aside and negate the attack.
grenade-defense.notes: Applies the required -5 UTF penalty until the start of your next turn whether successful or not.

guardian-strike.name: Guardian Strike
guardian-strike.description: When you damage a target with a lightsaber, it takes -2 on attack rolls against anyone other than you until your next turn.
guardian-strike.notes: The attack hook tags the target when it can prove a lightsaber damage event.

hold-the-line.name: Hold the Line
hold-the-line.description: A successful Attack of Opportunity against a target leaving your threatened area stops its movement and ends its action.
hold-the-line.notes: Triggered by successful AoO; GM adjudicates exact movement timing.

immovable.name: Immovable
immovable.description: Until the start of your next turn, attempts to move you involuntarily take -5.
immovable.notes: Creates a one-turn reminder effect on the actor.

improved-battle-meditation.name: Improved Battle Meditation
improved-battle-meditation.description: Activate Battle Meditation as a Swift Action, range 12 squares, and opponents in the radius take -1 on attack rolls.
improved-battle-meditation.notes: Requires Battle Meditation. Uses the same Battle Meditation implementation with improved range and enemy penalty.

mobile-combatant.name: Mobile Combatant
mobile-combatant.description: After ending movement adjacent to an opponent, shadow that opponent if it moves or withdraws before your next turn.
mobile-combatant.notes: Stores the selected opponent and posts the movement/AoO reminder.

clear-mind.name: Clear Mind
clear-mind.description: Reroll an opposed Use the Force check made to oppose Sense Force; keep the reroll.
clear-mind.notes: Use when opposing a Sense Force check.

dark-side-sense.name: Dark Side Sense
dark-side-sense.description: Reroll a Use the Force check made to sense the presence and relative location of characters with Dark Side Score 1+; keep the reroll.

dark-deception.name: Dark Deception
dark-deception.description: Toggle the Force-sensing mask: when another character attempts to sense you through the Force, you may choose to act as though your Dark Side Score equals your Wisdom score. Deception is a class skill.
dark-deception.notes: Force-sensing choice; no global bonus is applied.

improved-sentinel-strike.name: Improved Sentinel Strike
improved-sentinel-strike.description: Sentinel Strike damage dice are d8s instead of d6s.
improved-sentinel-strike.notes: Upgrades existing Sentinel Strike conditional damage; not a separate damage bonus.

improved-sentinels-gambit.name: Improved Sentinel's Gambit
improved-sentinels-gambit.description: Use Sentinel's Gambit additional times per encounter equal to half your Class Level (minimum 1).
improved-sentinels-gambit.notes: The Sentinel's Gambit action consumes the shared encounter-use tracker.

rebuke-the-dark.name: Rebuke the Dark
rebuke-the-dark.description: When using Rebuke against a Force Power with the [Dark Side] descriptor, roll two dice and keep the better result.
rebuke-the-dark.notes: Only applies to Rebuke attempts against [Dark Side] Force Powers.

taint-of-the-dark-side.name: Taint of the Dark Side
taint-of-the-dark-side.description: Choose one [Dark Side] Force Power to add to your suite. Once per encounter, use that chosen power without increasing Dark Side Score unless modified by a Force Point or Destiny Point.
taint-of-the-dark-side.notes: Creates/records the selected power; ForceExecutor suppresses the first unmodified DSS increase for that selected power each encounter.

dark-side-scourge.name: Dark Side Scourge
dark-side-scourge.description: Conditional extra melee damage equal to Charisma bonus, minimum +1, against creatures with Dark Side Score 1+.
dark-side-scourge.notes: Conditional; not a global damage bonus.

force-haze.name: Force Haze
force-haze.description: Spend a Force Point and make a Use the Force check to hide yourself and allies from perception for up to 1 minute.
force-haze.notes: Hides a number of creatures in line of sight up to class level; compare UTF to Will of opponents entering line of sight.

resist-the-dark-side.name: Resist the Dark Side
resist-the-dark-side.description: +5 Force bonus to all defenses only against [Dark Side] Force Powers and Force Powers from dark Force-users.
resist-the-dark-side.notes: Conditional; not a global permanent defense bonus.

dampen-presence.name: Dampen Presence
dampen-presence.description: After interacting with a sentient creature, make a Use the Force check; if it exceeds Will Defense, the target does not remember the interaction once you are gone.

dark-retaliation.name: Dark Retaliation
dark-retaliation.description: Once per encounter, spend a Force Point to activate a Force Power as a Reaction when targeted by a [Dark Side] Force Power.
dark-retaliation.notes: Select and expend a ready Force Power if tracked.

dark-side-bane.name: Dark Side Bane
dark-side-bane.description: Conditional extra damage equal to Charisma bonus, minimum +1, when a damage-dealing Force Power hits a creature with Dark Side Score 1+.
dark-side-bane.notes: Conditional; not a global Force damage bonus.

gradual-resistance.name: Gradual Resistance
gradual-resistance.description: After taking damage from a Force Power, gain +2 Force bonus to all defenses against that specific Force Power until the end of the encounter.
gradual-resistance.notes: Conditional defense bonus against one named Force Power only.

master-of-the-great-hunt.name: Master of the Great Hunt
master-of-the-great-hunt.description: +1 Force bonus on attack rolls and +1 damage die on Lightsaber attacks against a Beast with Dark Side Score 1+.
master-of-the-great-hunt.notes: Conditional; not a global attack or damage bonus.

persistent-haze.name: Persistent Haze
persistent-haze.description: When someone concealed by your Force Haze attacks, only that attacker loses Total Concealment; non-attackers remain concealed.
persistent-haze.notes: Applied as Force Haze metadata when Force Haze is activated.

prime-targets.name: Prime Targets
prime-targets.description: When you hit a target with a Lightsaber attack, if the target has not been attacked since the end of your last turn, deal +1 damage die.
prime-targets.notes: Requires table confirmation of target attack history.

reap-retribution.name: Reap Retribution
reap-retribution.description: After taking damage from a Force Power, deal +2 damage against the creature that used that Force Power against you until the end of the encounter.

sense-primal-force.name: Sense Primal Force
sense-primal-force.description: In natural wilderness, Sense Surroundings can detect targets out to 30 squares regardless of line of sight.

sentinel-strike.name: Sentinel Strike
sentinel-strike.description: Conditional +1d6 damage per selection, max +5d6, against flat-footed/denied-Dex targets with qualifying attacks.
sentinel-strike.notes: Applies to damage-dealing Force Powers or lightsaber attacks; excludes [Dark Side] Force Powers.

sentinels-gambit.name: Sentinel's Gambit
sentinels-gambit.description: Once per encounter, designate an adjacent opponent with Dark Side Score 1+; it loses Dex bonus to Reflex Defense against your attacks until the end of your next turn.
sentinels-gambit.notes: Target must be adjacent and have Dark Side Score 1+.

sentinels-observation.name: Sentinel's Observation
sentinels-observation.description: If you have Concealment against a target, gain +2 circumstance bonus on attack rolls against that target.
sentinels-observation.notes: Conditional; not a global attack bonus.

steel-resolve.name: Steel Resolve
steel-resolve.description: Make a standard-action melee attack with a -1 to -5 attack penalty and gain twice that value as insight bonus to Will Defense until your next turn, capped by BAB.
steel-resolve.notes: The selected attack penalty applies to the melee attack roll; Will bonus is temporary.

unseen-eyes.name: Unseen Eyes
unseen-eyes.description: Allies hidden by your Force Haze can reroll Perception checks and gain +2 damage against foes unaware of them.
unseen-eyes.notes: Applied as Force Haze metadata when Force Haze is activated.

lightsaber-defense.name: Lightsaber Defense
lightsaber-defense.description: Gain a temporary deflection bonus to Reflex Defense until the start of your next turn.
lightsaber-defense.notes: Bonus is +1 per talent selection, maximum +3; requires a drawn and ignited lightsaber and does not apply while Flat-Footed.

lightsaber-throw.name: Lightsaber Throw
lightsaber-throw.description: Throw a lightsaber as a normal thrown weapon; optionally pull it back with a DC 20 Use the Force check if within 6 squares.
lightsaber-throw.notes: The thrown attack itself uses the normal attack roller and range penalties.

cortosis-gauntlet-block.name: Cortosis Gauntlet Block
cortosis-gauntlet-block.description: Use Block with a Cortosis Gauntlet; successful Blocks against lightsabers deactivate the attacking lightsaber.

precise-redirect.name: Precise Redirect
precise-redirect.description: Successful Redirect Shot hits deal +1 damage die.
precise-redirect.notes: Triggered rider; not a permanent damage bonus.

precision.name: Precision
precision.description: Make a lightsaber attack against an adjacent opponent; on hit, reduce speed to 2 squares until the end of your next turn.
precision.notes: Attack and speed rider require target adjudication.

riposte.name: Riposte
riposte.description: Once per encounter after successfully Blocking a non-area melee attack, make a lightsaber attack against the attacker.
riposte.notes: Cannot be used after blocking melee area attacks.

shoto-focus.name: Shoto Focus
shoto-focus.description: +2 competence bonus on attacks with a short lightsaber/guard shoto while wielding it with a one-handed lightsaber.

weapon-specialization-lightsabers.name: Weapon Specialization (Lightsabers)
weapon-specialization-lightsabers.notes: Applied in lightsaber damage context, not as a global damage bonus.

shield-expert.name: Shield Expert
shield-expert.description: Once per encounter, regain 10 SR on an active Energy Shield, up to the shield maximum.
shield-expert.notes: Restores Shield Rating only; it does not recharge shield uses/charges.

force-fortification.name: Force Fortification
force-fortification.description: Spend 1 Force Point to negate a Critical Hit scored against you; take normal damage instead.
force-fortification.notes: The Force Point may be spent even if you already spent a Force Point earlier in the round.

greater-weapon-focus-lightsabers.name: Greater Weapon Focus (Lightsabers)
greater-weapon-focus-lightsabers.description: +1 melee attack rolls with lightsabers; stacks with Weapon Focus (Lightsabers).
greater-weapon-focus-lightsabers.notes: Applied through lightsaber melee attack context.

greater-weapon-specialization-lightsaber.name: Greater Weapon Specialization (Lightsabers)
greater-weapon-specialization-lightsaber.description: +2 melee damage rolls with lightsabers; stacks with Weapon Specialization (Lightsabers).
greater-weapon-specialization-lightsaber.notes: Applied through lightsaber melee damage context.

multiattack-proficiency-lightsabers.name: Multiattack Proficiency (Lightsabers)
multiattack-proficiency-lightsabers.description: Reduce Full Attack multiattack penalties with lightsabers by 2 per rank/copy.
multiattack-proficiency-lightsabers.notes: This talent can be selected multiple times. Each rank adds another +2 penalty reduction.

severing-strike.name: Severing Strike
severing-strike.description: When qualifying lightsaber damage would kill the target, deal half damage instead, move it -1 CT, and sever a limb.
severing-strike.notes: Use after confirming the damage equals/exceeds both current HP and Damage Threshold. Creates persistent injury; surgery/cybernetics adjudicated by GM.

improved-lightsaber-throw.name: Improved Lightsaber Throw
improved-lightsaber-throw.description: Spend 1 Force Point to throw a lightsaber through a 6-square line as an Area Attack.
improved-lightsaber-throw.notes: Make one ranged attack roll vs each target Reflex; hit normal damage, miss half damage. Optional DC 20 UTF pull-back.

improved-riposte.name: Improved Riposte
improved-riposte.description: Successful Riposte causes the triggering Block not to count toward cumulative Block/Deflect penalties.
improved-riposte.notes: Applied automatically by the Riposte action when a tracked Block use exists.

improved-redirect.name: Improved Redirect
improved-redirect.description: Once per turn, successful Redirect causes the triggering Deflect not to count toward cumulative Block/Deflect penalties.
improved-redirect.notes: Applied automatically by the Redirect Shot action when a tracked Deflect use exists.

lightsaber-form-savant.name: Lightsaber Form Savant
lightsaber-form-savant.description: Once per encounter per rank, recover one spent [Lightsaber Form] Force Power without spending a Force Point.
lightsaber-form-savant.notes: Handled from the Force Suite discard pile, like Telekinetic Savant and Influence Savant.

thrown-lightsaber-mastery.name: Thrown Lightsaber Mastery
thrown-lightsaber-mastery.description: Targets successfully struck by a thrown lightsaber move at half Speed until the beginning of your next turn.
thrown-lightsaber-mastery.notes: Improved Lightsaber Throw reminds users of this rider.

shoto-master.name: Shoto Master
shoto-master.description: Treat a one-handed lightsaber as light when wielding it with a light lightsaber/shoto; Lightsaber Defense may be free with that loadout.
shoto-master.notes: When owned, the Lightsaber Defense action uses Free action economy; loadout requirement remains player/GM adjudicated.

adopt-lightsaber-form-ataru.name: Adopt Ataru Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-ataru.description: Make Ataru your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-ataru.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-ataru.name: Ataru active benefit reminder
lightsaber-form-ataru.description: While Ataru is your active form, use Dexterity instead of Strength for lightsaber damage.
lightsaber-form-ataru.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-djem-so.name: Adopt Djem So Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-djem-so.description: Make Djem So your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-djem-so.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-djem-so.name: Djem So reaction
lightsaber-form-djem-so.description: While Djem So is active, spend 1 Force Point as a Reaction after being hit by a melee attack to attack that opponent.
lightsaber-form-djem-so.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-jar-kai.name: Adopt Jar'Kai Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-jar-kai.description: Make Jar'Kai your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-jar-kai.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-jar-kai.name: Jar'Kai active benefit reminder
lightsaber-form-jar-kai.description: While Jar'Kai is active, Lightsaber Defense is doubled when wielding two lightsabers.
lightsaber-form-jar-kai.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-juyo.name: Adopt Juyo Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-juyo.description: Make Juyo your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-juyo.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-juyo.name: Juyo target designation
lightsaber-form-juyo.description: While Juyo is active, spend 1 Force Point as a Swift Action once per encounter to designate a target.
lightsaber-form-juyo.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-makashi.name: Adopt Makashi Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-makashi.description: Make Makashi your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-makashi.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-makashi.name: Makashi active benefit reminder
lightsaber-form-makashi.description: While Makashi is active, Lightsaber Defense increases by +2, maximum +5, when wielding a single one-handed lightsaber.
lightsaber-form-makashi.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-niman.name: Adopt Niman Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-niman.description: Make Niman your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-niman.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-niman.name: Niman active benefit reminder
lightsaber-form-niman.description: While Niman is active and you wield a lightsaber, gain +1 Reflex Defense and +1 Will Defense.
lightsaber-form-niman.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-shien.name: Adopt Shien Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-shien.description: Make Shien your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-shien.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-shien.name: Shien active benefit reminder
lightsaber-form-shien.description: While Shien is active, gain +5 to Redirect Shot ranged attacks.
lightsaber-form-shien.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-shii-cho.name: Adopt Shii-Cho Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-shii-cho.description: Make Shii-Cho your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-shii-cho.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-shii-cho.name: Shii-Cho active benefit reminder
lightsaber-form-shii-cho.description: While Shii-Cho is active, Block/Deflect cumulative penalties are -2 per previous use instead of -5.
lightsaber-form-shii-cho.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-sokan.name: Adopt Sokan Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-sokan.description: Make Sokan your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-sokan.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-sokan.name: Sokan active benefit reminder
lightsaber-form-sokan.description: While Sokan is active, Take 10 on Acrobatics checks to Tumble even when threatened.
lightsaber-form-sokan.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-soresu.name: Adopt Soresu Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-soresu.description: Make Soresu your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-soresu.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-soresu.name: Soresu active benefit reminder
lightsaber-form-soresu.description: While Soresu is active, reroll a failed UTF check when using Block or Deflect.
lightsaber-form-soresu.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-trakata.name: Adopt Trakata Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-trakata.description: Make Trakata your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-trakata.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-trakata.name: Trakata Feint
lightsaber-form-trakata.description: While Trakata is active, spend two Swift Actions to make a Deception check to Feint in combat.
lightsaber-form-trakata.notes: Requires two Swift Actions. This benefit only applies if Trakata is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

adopt-lightsaber-form-vaapad.name: Adopt Vaapad Form
adopt-lightsaber-form-vaapad.description: Make Vaapad your one active Lightsaber Form. Inactive forms provide no benefits.
adopt-lightsaber-form-vaapad.notes: Only one Lightsaber Form can be active at a time; activating this form replaces any previous active form.

lightsaber-form-vaapad.name: Vaapad active benefit reminder
lightsaber-form-vaapad.description: While Vaapad is active, lightsaber attacks threaten critical hits on natural 19-20; natural 19 is not automatic hit.
lightsaber-form-vaapad.notes: This benefit only applies if this is currently the actor's active Lightsaber Form.

force-warning.name: Force Warning
force-warning.description: Allies within 12 squares may reroll Initiative at combat start and surprised allies may be designated as no longer surprised.
force-warning.notes: Start-of-combat reminder; exact ally selection remains GM/player adjudicated.

improved-quick-draw-lightsabers.name: Improved Quick Draw (Lightsabers)
improved-quick-draw-lightsabers.description: Draw, ignite, and attack with a lightsaber during the Surprise Round, and draw/ignite once per turn as a free action.
improved-quick-draw-lightsabers.notes: Draw, ignite, and attack with a lightsaber during the Surprise Round, and draw/ignite once per turn as a free action.

sheltering-stance.name: Sheltering Stance
sheltering-stance.description: When adjacent to an ally, use Block or Deflect against attacks targeting that ally without spending a Force Point.
sheltering-stance.notes: Block/Deflect dialogs include the Sheltering Stance protection option.

vigilance.name: Vigilance
vigilance.description: Designate one adjacent ally; that ally gains +1 deflection bonus to Reflex Defense while you remain adjacent.
vigilance.notes: Applies a temporary +1 Reflex effect to the selected ally; adjacency/duration is table-managed.

watchmans-advance.name: Watchman's Advance
watchmans-advance.description: During the Surprise Round, you and allies can take one extra Move Action; a character can gain only one such extra Move Action.
watchmans-advance.notes: During the Surprise Round, you and allies can take one extra Move Action; a character can gain only one such extra Move Action.

defensive-circle.name: Defensive Circle
defensive-circle.description: You and allies affected by your Battle Meditation gain +2 insight Reflex; you also gain +1 to Block/Deflect UTF checks per adjacent lightsaber-wielding ally.
defensive-circle.notes: Applies +2 Reflex to selected Battle Meditation targets; adjacent lightsaber bonus is surfaced as a callout.

force-revive.name: Force Revive
force-revive.description: Spend a Force Point as a Reaction when an ally affected by Battle Meditation drops to 0 HP, allowing the ally to take Second Wind as a Reaction.
force-revive.notes: Spend a Force Point as a Reaction when an ally affected by Battle Meditation drops to 0 HP, allowing the ally to take Second Wind as a Reaction.

jedi-battle-commander.name: Jedi Battle Commander
jedi-battle-commander.description: Your Battle Meditation grants +2 insight bonus on attack rolls instead of +1.
jedi-battle-commander.notes: Battle Meditation runtime reads this talent and upgrades the attack bonus to +2.

slashing-charge.name: Slashing Charge
slashing-charge.description: Once per encounter while charging, ignore cumulative Block penalties during the Charge and apply the Charge attack bonus to Riposte attacks.
slashing-charge.notes: Encounter rider/reminder; Block/Riposte timing remains player declared.

mobile-attack-lightsabers.name: Mobile Attack (Lightsabers)
mobile-attack-lightsabers.description: After a Full Attack with two lightsabers or a double-bladed lightsaber, move up to Speed as a free action.
mobile-attack-lightsabers.notes: After a Full Attack with two lightsabers or a double-bladed lightsaber, move up to Speed as a free action.

direct.name: Direct
direct.description: Return one spent Force Power to the Force Power Suite of an ally within 6 squares and line of sight.
direct.notes: Opens selected ally/power flow and readies one spent power on that ally.

impart-knowledge.name: Impart Knowledge
impart-knowledge.description: Aid Another on a Knowledge check of an ally within 6 squares as a Reaction for Knowledge skills you are trained in.
impart-knowledge.notes: Roll helper/callout; ally range and trained Knowledge skill are table-verified.

insight-of-the-force.name: Insight of the Force
insight-of-the-force.description: Use Use the Force instead of untrained Knowledge checks; treated as trained for this talent.
insight-of-the-force.notes: Derived skill calculator substitutes Use the Force for untrained Knowledge skills.

master-advisor.name: Master Advisor
master-advisor.description: When you use Skilled Advisor, the ally gains one temporary Force Point at the end of their next turn, lost at encounter end if unspent.
master-advisor.notes: Skilled Advisor marks the ally; the combat-turn hook grants the temporary Force Point at the end of their next turn.

scholarly-knowledge.name: Scholarly Knowledge
scholarly-knowledge.description: Reroll a trained Knowledge check as a Swift Action and keep the better result.
scholarly-knowledge.notes: Reroll a trained Knowledge check as a Swift Action and keep the better result.

force-treatment.name: Force Treatment
force-treatment.description: Use Use the Force in place of Treat Injury and count as trained for purposes of this talent.
force-treatment.notes: Derived skill calculator already substitutes Use the Force for Treat Injury when present.

healing-boost.name: Healing Boost
healing-boost.description: Vital Transfer heals additional damage equal to your class level.
healing-boost.notes: Vital Transfer healing rider; surfaced as action reminder for the existing Force Power flow.

improved-healing-boost.name: Improved Healing Boost
improved-healing-boost.description: Vital Transfer heals additional damage equal to 2 x your class level.
improved-healing-boost.notes: Overrides Healing Boost magnitude when both are present; surfaced as action reminder for existing Force Power flow.

soothe.name: Soothe
soothe.description: When using Vital Transfer, move the target +1 step on the Condition Track instead of healing damage; you move -1 step.
soothe.notes: Condition-track alternative reminder; table chooses this mode during Vital Transfer.

cover-your-tracks.name: Cover Your Tracks
cover-your-tracks.description: Attempts to locate you using Gather Information suffer a -5 penalty.
cover-your-tracks.notes: Attempts to locate you using Gather Information suffer a -5 penalty.

difficult-to-sense.name: Difficult to Sense
difficult-to-sense.description: Reroll opposed Use the Force checks made to conceal your presence from Force-users and keep the better result.
difficult-to-sense.notes: Reroll opposed Use the Force checks made to conceal your presence from Force-users and keep the better result.

force-veil.name: Force Veil
force-veil.description: Reduce the detection radius for sensing you to 10 kilometers instead of 100 kilometers.
force-veil.notes: Reduce the detection radius for sensing you to 10 kilometers instead of 100 kilometers.

jedi-network.name: Jedi Network
jedi-network.description: Once per game session in a civilized area, call on Jedi sympathizers for equipment/funds, information, medical attention, or a safe house.
jedi-network.notes: Once per game session in a civilized area, call on Jedi sympathizers for equipment/funds, information, medical attention, or a safe house.

call-weapon.name: Call Weapon
call-weapon.description: Use Move Light Object to call a lightsaber you built into your hand and ignite it as a free action if it is in line of sight.
call-weapon.notes: Free-action helper/reminder; actual Move Light Object check uses existing Use the Force flow as needed.

lightsaber-specialist.name: Lightsaber Specialist
lightsaber-specialist.description: With a lightsaber you built, gain +2 morale bonus on Use the Force checks for Block and Deflect.
lightsaber-specialist.notes: Block/Deflect dialogs include an optional Lightsaber Specialist +2 modifier.

masterwork-lightsaber.name: Masterwork Lightsaber
masterwork-lightsaber.description: When building a lightsaber, add one extra accessory/modification; reroll one damage die on hits with your own lightsaber; mentor construction at -5 DC.
masterwork-lightsaber.notes: When building a lightsaber, add one extra accessory/modification; reroll one damage die on hits with your own lightsaber; mentor construction at -5 DC.

perfect-attunement.name: Perfect Attunement
perfect-attunement.description: When you spend a Force Point on a lightsaber attack roll with a lightsaber you built, add the same amount to damage if the attack hits.
perfect-attunement.notes: When you spend a Force Point on a lightsaber attack roll with a lightsaber you built, add the same amount to damage if the attack hits.

quick-modification.name: Quick Modification
quick-modification.description: Spend 1 minute modifying a lightsaber you built, swapping one accessory/modification for another.
quick-modification.notes: Spend 1 minute modifying a lightsaber you built, swapping one accessory/modification for another.

apprentice-boon.name: Apprentice Boon
apprentice-boon.description: Spend a Force Point as a Reaction to add to an ally's Use the Force check if they are within 12 squares and have a lower UTF bonus.
apprentice-boon.notes: Spend a Force Point as a Reaction to add to an ally's Use the Force check if they are within 12 squares and have a lower UTF bonus.

share-force-secret.name: Share Force Secret
share-force-secret.description: Grant one chosen Force Secret you know to a trained ally within 12 squares until the end of your next turn.
share-force-secret.notes: Grant one chosen Force Secret you know to a trained ally within 12 squares until the end of your next turn.

share-force-technique.name: Share Force Technique
share-force-technique.description: Grant one chosen Force Technique you know, except Force Point Recovery, to a trained ally within 12 squares until the end of your next turn.
share-force-technique.notes: Grant one chosen Force Technique you know, except Force Point Recovery, to a trained ally within 12 squares until the end of your next turn.

share-talent.name: Share Talent
share-talent.description: Once per day, spend a Force Point to share a chosen eligible lightsaber talent with trained allies within 12 squares for the encounter.
share-talent.notes: Once per day, spend a Force Point to share a chosen eligible lightsaber talent with trained allies within 12 squares for the encounter.

transfer-power.name: Transfer Power
transfer-power.description: Spend one use of a Force Power in your suite to add a one-use copy to an ally trained in Use the Force within 12 squares and line of sight.
transfer-power.notes: Spend one use of a Force Power in your suite to add a one-use copy to an ally trained in Use the Force within 12 squares and line of sight.

echoes-of-the-force.name: Echoes of the Force
echoes-of-the-force.description: Use Farseeing on a location instead of a creature to view the location's past while standing there.
echoes-of-the-force.notes: Use Farseeing on a location instead of a creature to view the location's past while standing there.

jedi-quarry.name: Jedi Quarry
jedi-quarry.description: Designate one target; gain +2 Speed when using a Move Action if you end adjacent to that target until the encounter condition ends.
jedi-quarry.notes: Designate one target; gain +2 Speed when using a Move Action if you end adjacent to that target until the encounter condition ends.

prepared-for-danger.name: Prepared for Danger
prepared-for-danger.description: Spend an unspent Farseeing Force Power to regain any one other Force Power as a Swift Action.
prepared-for-danger.notes: Spend an unspent Farseeing Force Power to regain any one other Force Power as a Swift Action.

sense-deception.name: Sense Deception
sense-deception.description: When Deception or Persuasion targets your Will Defense, roll Use the Force and use it in place of Will Defense if higher.
sense-deception.notes: When Deception or Persuasion targets your Will Defense, roll Use the Force and use it in place of Will Defense if higher.

unclouded-judgement.name: Unclouded Judgement
unclouded-judgement.description: Spend a Force Point as a Reaction to negate a Mind-Affecting Force Power or Force Talent targeting you.
unclouded-judgement.notes: Spend a Force Point as a Reaction to negate a Mind-Affecting Force Power or Force Talent targeting you.

combat-trance.name: Combat Trance
combat-trance.description: After using Battle Strike, keep its attack bonus on your first melee attack each round until encounter end; the effect ends if you skip attacking in a round.
combat-trance.notes: After using Battle Strike, keep its attack bonus on your first melee attack each round until encounter end; the effect ends if you skip attacking in a round.

improvised-weapon-mastery.name: Improvised Weapon Mastery
improvised-weapon-mastery.description: Take no penalty on attacks made with improvised weapons.
improvised-weapon-mastery.notes: Take no penalty on attacks made with improvised weapons.

twin-weapon-style.name: Twin Weapon Style
twin-weapon-style.description: As a Standard Action while wielding two weapons or a double weapon, make one attack with each weapon/end against different targets.
twin-weapon-style.notes: As a Standard Action while wielding two weapons or a double weapon, make one attack with each weapon/end against different targets.

twin-weapon-mastery.name: Twin Weapon Mastery
twin-weapon-mastery.description: When using Twin Weapon Style, move 2 squares between each attack; this movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
twin-weapon-mastery.notes: When using Twin Weapon Style, move 2 squares between each attack; this movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

shoto-pin.name: Shoto Pin
shoto-pin.description: With a light lightsaber, after successfully using Block to negate a melee attack, prevent the attacker from making further melee attacks until the start of its next turn or until the effect ends.
shoto-pin.notes: Block chat surfaces this rider when you mark Shoto Pin.
